name: Amaroq Minerals Ltd.
description: Amaroq Minerals Ltd. is a mining company focused on identifying, acquiring, exploring, and developing gold and strategic metal properties in South Greenland. The company's principal asset is a 100% interest in the Nalunaq Gold Mine, a high-grade past-producing mine. Amaroq Minerals also holds a significant portfolio of gold and strategic metal exploration licenses covering various prospective areas in Southern Greenland, positioning itself as a leading explorer in the region.
